feedback_text: The professor explained complex concepts very clearly. Great course!
Assignments were too difficult and grading was unfair.
Excellent hands-on lab sessions. Learned a lot about programming!
The course structure was well organized. Weekly deadlines were reasonable.
Professor was very approachable and provided helpful feedback on assignments.
Too much workload. Couldn't keep up with all assignments.
Great teaching methodology with real-world examples. Very engaging lectures!
Lab equipment was outdated and frequently malfunctioning.
The course material was very useful for my career.
Mentoring sessions were helpful. Got clarity on many topics.
Poor communication from faculty about assignment deadlines.
The practical sessions were well-designed and relevant to industry.
Course content was too theoretical without practical applications.
Grading criteria was transparent and fair.
The professor lacks enthusiasm and doesn't engage students.
